name: LL Burns PARK
description: LL Burns PARK is a place to play pickleball in Kingston Springs, TN. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Pegram Park
description: Pegram Park is a place to play pickleball in Pegram, TN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
